summary: Completed comprehensive Phase 2 testing: 2FA (setup, enable, login, disable), Retainer plans & assignments (CRUD + member isolation), Covenants (create, list, sign, PDF), Email outbox (mock queue), Inline editor on pages. Backend: 65/65 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All Phase 2 UIs functional. MVP regression: All public pages, admin CMS, login working. Found 1 bug: Inline editor missing on press posts.

ui_bugs.issue: Inline editor not visible on press posts (e.g., /press/silence-strategy). Component imports InlineEditor but doesn't render it.
ui_bugs.fix: Add <InlineEditor resourceType="post" slug={slug} /> before closing </PublicLayout> tag (similar to CmsPage.js line 28)

passed_tests: Backend: All 65 API tests passed (100% success rate)
2FA: Status check, setup with QR code, enable with TOTP code, login with 2FA challenge, disable
Retainer Plans: List (3 seeded plans), Create, Update, Delete
Retainer Assignments: List as owner (3 retainers with populated plan/athlete), List as member (only own retainer), Create, Update status
Covenants: List as owner (2 seeded), List as member (only own), Create, PDF download
Email Outbox: List queued emails, Verify invite emails with CTA links
Public pages: Home, Athletes, Press, Contact all load
Login: Member and admin login working
Portal: TwoFactorPanel visible in /portal/account, Retainer page with card and manage billing button, Covenants page with list and signing modal (typed name + canvas signature)
Admin: Retainers page with plans/assignments tabs, Covenants page with table and new button, Outbox page with queued emails and CTA links
Admin CMS: Pages and Posts lists load (MVP regression)
Inline Editor: Visible on /p/manifesto with 5 editable fields, publish/save/discard buttons working

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (1 minor bug: inline editor missing on posts)

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix inline editor on press posts: Add <InlineEditor resourceType="post" slug={slug} /> to /app/frontend/src/pages/public/PressDetail.js (line 42, before </PublicLayout>). Reference: /app/frontend/src/pages/public/CmsPage.js line 28 for correct implementation.
